nodes.label: Nourah App Icon (Primary)
nodes.description: Primary app icon for Nourah used by iOS and general app metadata. Currently a placeholder/wireframe-style design: three concentric circles centered on a light gray grid background, suggesting a target or radial brand glyph. No final brand color or typographic mark is applied yet — this appears to be a temporary scaffolding icon awaiting final brand artwork.

nodes.label: Concentric Circles Brand Glyph
nodes.description: The visual mark contained in the primary icon: three nested rings of decreasing radius drawn in a muted lavender-gray stroke over a faint square grid. Conveys focus, layers, or a radar/target metaphor — fitting a skincare/scanning product like Nourah where the user's face is the analytical center. Likely placeholder pending final brand identity.
